summary: Comprehensive testing of Issues #2 and #3 fixes completed. Issue #2 (Project Details status updates display) fully verified and working. Issue #3 (AI health status logic) prompt enhancement documented. Backend: 100% pass rate (11/11 tests). Frontend: Issue #2 fix confirmed working with all required fields displayed.

verified_fixes.fix_description: Added useQuery hook to fetch status updates from /api/status-updates/project/{project_id} endpoint and created 'Recent Status Updates' section on Overview tab
verified_fixes.verification: Section found at [data-testid='status-updates-section'] with all required fields: health badge, schedule status, progress percentage, accomplishments, blockers, and next steps

test_results.section_location: Overview tab, below AI Summary section
fields_verified: Health status badge (Green/Amber/Red with color indicator)
test_results.empty_state: Verified - displays 'No status updates yet' message when no updates exist

verified_fixes.fix_description: Enhanced AI system prompt to explicitly state that health MUST be 'Amber' or 'Red' when schedule_status is 'Delayed' or 'At Risk', not 'Green'
verified_fixes.verification: Code review confirmed prompt enhancement at lines 2385-2389 in server.py
verified_fixes.status: DOCUMENTED - Cannot fully test without actual AI integration

guidance_added: If schedule_status is 'Delayed' or 'At Risk', then health MUST be 'Amber' or 'Red', NOT 'Green'
If user mentions delays, blockers, or risks, set health to 'Amber' (minor issues) or 'Red' (critical issues)
Only set health to 'Green' when project is explicitly on track with no issues

passed_tests: Backend: Timesheet restriction check (Thursday/Friday Sydney time)
Backend: Projects API returns health metrics
Backend: My projects for status updates
Backend: Get project status updates by project ID (Issue #2 endpoint)
Frontend: Navigate to project detail page
Frontend: Project detail page loads with Overview tab
Frontend: Recent Status Updates section present (Issue #2 fix)
Frontend: Status updates display health badge
Frontend: Status updates display schedule status
Frontend: Status updates display progress percentage
Frontend: Status updates display next steps

low_priority: Issue #3: Consider testing AI health status logic with actual AI commands to verify the prompt enhancement is working as expected. Example test: 'Website project is delayed, we're at 60% complete' should set health to Amber or Red, not Green.
action_item_for_main_agent.notes: Both Issue #2 and Issue #3 fixes have been successfully implemented. Issue #2 is fully verified and working. Issue #3 prompt enhancement is in place but requires AI integration testing to fully verify behavior.

implementation_details.location: Overview tab, after AI Summary section

test_results.backend_api: Returns list of status updates with all required fields
test_results.frontend_display: Section renders correctly with 4 status updates found
test_results.empty_state: Displays 'No status updates yet' message when no updates exist

issue_2_fix_verification.evidence: Test output shows all fields present and correctly displayed. Backend API returns 4 status updates for Website Redesign project.

issue_3_fix_verification.enhancement_summary: AI prompt now explicitly instructs that health status MUST be Amber or Red when schedule is Delayed or At Risk. This prevents the AI from incorrectly setting health to Green when there are delays.
issue_3_fix_verification.testing_limitation: Full verification requires actual AI command testing with real API keys and AI responses. The prompt enhancement is in place and correctly formatted.
issue_3_fix_verification.recommendation: Test with actual AI commands like: 'Website project is delayed, we're at 60% complete, blocked on API integration' to verify health is set to Amber/Red, not Green.
